description:
BURN_IN_TARGET: NYC Ops Mechanic
PARENT: DAS-98 / 1be2d0ce-2921-473e-b543-1ecced3155ac
STATUS: todo
PROJECT: Ultimate Workbench

Objective: verify hermes-nyc1-multica runtime health and confirm no obvious memory pressure after the user's tmux Hermes session was closed.

Hard constraints:
- Read-only. No process kill, daemon restart, package install/update, cleanup, or destructive command.
- No token, OAuth, API key, cookie, raw env, or private credential printing.
- Keep final comment under 700 words.

Required checks:
1. Runtime identity and pressure: hostname, pwd, uname, free -h, df -h .
2. Multica daemon status if available.
3. Process pressure summary: top memory/cpu processes by command only; do not print full command lines if they include secrets.
4. tmux state: list sessions if available; do not attach.
5. Remote agent visibility/status if available via Multica CLI.

Completion report exact shape:
REMOTE_BURNIN_REPORT
AGENT:
RUNTIME:
COMMANDS:
PRESSURE:
DAEMON:
FAILURE_MODE:
TOKEN_RISK:
NEXT_ACTION:
VERDICT: PASS / FLAG / BLOCK
title: NYC burn-in C: Ops pressure and daemon hygiene
